cards.front: Insert operation in a linked list
cards.back: Adding a new node at the beginning or at a specific position in the linked list.

cards.front: Delete operation in a linked list
cards.back: Removing a specified node from the linked list, which can be at the beginning, end, or at a specific position.

cards.front: Display or Traverse operation in a linked list
cards.back: Visiting each node in the linked list and printing or displaying its data.

cards.front: Insert operation in a singly linked list
cards.back: Adding a new node at the beginning or at the end of the linked list.

cards.front: Delete operation in a singly linked list
cards.back: Removing a specified node from the linked list, which can be at the beginning, end, or at a specific position.
